notes: Labeled test set for evaluating the Prahari/Rakshak AI scam classifier. 'expert_scam' cases avoid obvious trigger words (OTP, PIN, blocked) to test generalization beyond the training templates. 'false_positive_bait' cases are genuinely legitimate messages that share surface features with scams (urgency, money, the words OTP/fraud/blocked) to test whether the classifier over-triggers on keywords alone.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Good afternoon, I am calling from the cyber crime cell regarding a parcel registered under your Aadhaar number that was intercepted at customs. To avoid a formal FIR being filed against you, I need you to stay on this call and follow the verification process I describe.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: This is regarding your savings account which is scheduled for temporary restriction due to incomplete re-KYC. To complete verification instantly instead of visiting the branch, I will read out a message that will arrive on your registered mobile, please confirm the six digits you see there.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: I'm following up on the investment webinar you attended last month. Returns this quarter have been strong and a few slots remain in the fixed plan before it closes on the 15th, would you like me to reserve one for you today with a smaller initial amount?

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Your parcel from Mumbai couriers has been held because one document is missing, this happens sometimes with international shipments, I can help you clear this over a quick verification call so it isn't returned.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: We noticed unusual activity from a device linked to your number, this is a routine advisory call, no action needed unless you'd like me to walk you through securing the account right now.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Mom, don't panic, I'm okay, but I'm in a bit of trouble and can't talk long, my friend is going to call you about sending something for me, please just listen to him.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Congratulations, you've been shortlisted for the work-from-home data entry role, HR will explain a small refundable registration process before onboarding starts.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Your electricity connection is scheduled for disconnection tonight at 9:30pm due to a billing discrepancy, if this is inconvenient I can transfer you to the billing department to resolve it right now.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Sir aapka account thodi der ke liye restrict ho sakta hai, main aapko verify karne ke liye ek process follow karwata hoon, bas confirm kijiye jo message aaya hai.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Congratulations messages aside, the one formality that remains is a small processing fee before the disbursal team can release the transfer to your registered account.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Your OTP for the transaction of Rs 4500 at Amazon is 738291. Do not share this OTP with anyone. - HDFC Bank

cases.label: safe
cases.text: This is a courtesy call from your bank's fraud monitoring team. We noticed an unusual transaction attempt on your card and have blocked it as a precaution. We will never ask you for your PIN or OTP; please call the number on the back of your card if you have concerns.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: This is a reminder call from Apollo Hospital for your appointment tomorrow at 10am with Dr. Sharma, please confirm if you'll be able to make it.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Your Amazon package will be delivered today between 2pm and 6pm, please ensure someone is available to receive it.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Your prepaid balance is low, recharge before midnight to avoid service interruption.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: As per RBI guidelines your KYC is due for update, please visit your nearest branch with your Aadhaar and PAN card at your convenience, there's no urgency.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: This is calling from the local Panchayat office regarding the Ayushman Bharat health card camp on Saturday, would you like to register?

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Hi, this is regarding the complaint you registered yesterday about your gas connection, an engineer will visit tomorrow between 11 and 1.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Your car insurance policy is expiring on the 20th, would you like me to send the renewal quote on WhatsApp so your family can review it too?

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Beta maine tumhare liye recharge karva diya hai, mobile check kar lena.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Please don't call the bank helpline right now, that will get flagged as a duplicate report and delay resolving this. I'm already handling it directly with the fraud team, just stay on this call with me.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: There's no need to disturb your son, I know how these things can worry family unnecessarily, I'll take care of everything from my end, just tell me the code that arrives on your phone.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Sir, just hand the phone to me for two minutes, I'll do all the steps myself since this can be a bit technical, you don't need to worry about it.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Our field executive will come to your home this evening to collect the card and documents for verification, please have them ready, no need to visit the branch yourself.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: I understand you want to call your bank to confirm, but that number is currently overloaded with complaints like yours, staying on this call is actually faster.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Don't worry, we've already blocked your card as a precaution after detecting the suspicious transaction. No further action is needed from you right now; if you'd like to confirm, feel free to call the number on the back of your card.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Please read out the six-digit code that just arrived on your phone so I can verify your identity on our end.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Just tell me the last four digits of your card and the one-time code you're seeing right now, this is standard verification on our side.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: Since the card needs to be blocked immediately for your safety, our courier will come to collect your debit card from your home within the hour, please keep the PIN written down for the technician.

cases.label: scam
cases.text: As per the cyber crime department's investigation, you need to hand over your Aadhaar-linked debit card to our verification officer who will visit you today.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: For your safety, banks and RBI never ask you to share your OTP, PIN, or card details over a phone call - if anyone does, please hang up immediately and report it.

cases.label: safe
cases.text: Your new debit card has been dispatched and will arrive by courier within 5-7 working days, please keep your ID proof ready to receive it.
